ab: Ilumaq a baia?
Ilumaq, Ihaan aipa sapalan masabaq.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: Ilumaq a baia?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: Uka, laupang aipa munata, nasanavanin aipa mulumaq.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: Ilumaq a akia?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: Ihaan aipa dadaza ta, munhana dadaza ta kilim istaa!
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: Haiza bunun ilumaq?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: Laung qana! Talmadia’in aak nii saduu suu. Masihal aas?
ch: B:是Laung阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Laung. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: Masihal i! Munsu’uan aak haip pababazbaz suu.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: Isaq suu tama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: Ihaan aipa pipit’aian mahanat sanglav, naluklasak aipa.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: Mun’isaq a Malasa?
en: Where did Malas go?

ab: Munhaan aipa patulkukan madamu ki tulkuk.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: Aki! minsuma’in aam.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: Munhaan muu akia quma kuzakuza, uka ilumaq, ihaana amu lumaq ta maltatala istaa mulumaq.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: Minsuma’in qana aas pantamaun!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: Talmadia’in nitu pasaduu, taldaqvasin aas.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: Manahip aak saduu suu mun’iti.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: Maaq a bunglai una ispaska muu, pihanav piskakazhav kunbu madainpus.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: Talmadia’in nitu patantutungu, na’anpukuk amu muskun maun i qaising.
ch: A:這麼久沒有互訪，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: Azuq nii, munhaan ata lumaq ta, quud ki ucia pababazbaz.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我們喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: Uninang imuu sinkasaulvaz zakuan, namudanin aak.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: Laupang a tulkuk un pinataz, dasav mapulumaq mapit’ia.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去煮。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
